label: NP Advanced Practice Content Blueprint
description: Blueprint map for NP-level (FNP/AGPCNP/PMHNP) advanced practice content. Each entry is a planned lesson+question unit at graduate clinical complexity. Targets AANP/ANCC exam domains and real-world primary/urgent care scope.

difficultyScale.medium: Requires synthesis of 2+ concepts, guideline application
difficultyScale.hard: Requires differential reasoning, management sequencing, or prescribing decision under ambiguity
difficultyScale.expert: Multi-system, competing priorities, high-stakes prescribing, or ethics-laden clinical judgment
